name: askthecompiler
description: Heaven for Competitive Programming / DSA Lovers and Development lovers , ask your questions , answer questions , be it theoretical , conceptual or even code - based . Solve each other's doubts and help growing the CP / Dev communities <3

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
